title: Game of Darts Overview
seoTitle: Game of Darts Overview | BarkinMad Studios
description: A practical introduction to Game of Darts, its score tracking, player statistics, and Game Center features.
summary: Game of Darts is a darts scoring companion for iPhone and iPad with match setup, multiple darts formats, player statistics, cloud-backed data, Game Center support, DartBot, and premium access options.

sections.heading: What is Game of Darts?
paragraphs: Game of Darts is a modern darts scoring app from [BarkinMad Studios](/about), designed for casual players, league nights, practice sessions, and competitive matches on iPhone and iPad.

Whether you're playing X01, Cricket, Bob's 27, Snooker Darts, or one of the many other game modes, Game of Darts helps you keep score, track your performance, compete on Game Center leaderboards, unlock achievements, and improve your game over time.

sections.heading: Guide map
paragraphs: Everything you need to get the most from Game of Darts can be found in the guides below. Learn the controls, explore every game mode, discover match types, challenge DartBot, track your statistics, customise your experience, and climb the leaderboards.
Whether you're a beginner learning the basics or an experienced player chasing your next personal best, these guides are designed to help you enjoy every aspect of the game.

featureShowcases.heading: Start a darts session quickly
featureShowcases.summary: The overview introduces Game of Darts as a practical scoring companion for real match nights, casual games, and practice sessions.
body: This view shows the flow from opening the app into choosing players and a game format. A scoring app should stay out of the way once players are ready to throw.
Players use this flow to move from launch into Match, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, or another supported format without needing a paper scoreboard.
bullets: Supports iPhone and iPad scoring sessions.
Covers casual play, practice, and competitive formats.
Leads into player setup, scoring, results, and progress tracking.

image.alt: Game of Darts main setup screen showing the start of a session
image.caption: The main setup screen is the practical starting point for most player sessions.

featureShowcases.heading: Turn matches into progress
featureShowcases.summary: Game of Darts links scoring with statistics, leaderboards, achievements, DartBot, and settings so players can keep improving over time.
body: This matters because the app is not only a scoreboard. Completed games can feed player statistics, Game Center comparison, achievements, and the next practice plan.
Players use the supporting screens after a match to review performance, compare scores, adjust settings, or choose a tougher DartBot challenge.
bullets: Statistics help players understand scoring and consistency.
Leaderboards and achievements add optional Game Center goals.
DartBot and settings help tailor practice to the player.

image.alt: Game of Darts leaderboard screen used after play
image.caption: Progress screens give players somewhere to go after the final dart.
